speaker: speaker1
text: Hide me , Yi-jun ! The kids all think I'm the real Easter bunny !

speaker: speaker2
text: Aw , that's sweet ! I knew your costume would be a success .

speaker: speaker1
text: It's a success all right . The kids keep trying to catch me .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah , I saw that . I thought you were playing a game with them .

speaker: speaker1
text: Some game ! You try being tackled by ten kids at once !

speaker: speaker2
text: Um , Holly ? Look behind you . They're coming this way .
